# Promo — Creator Marketing Platform
> Connecting brands with verified influencers through a structured, escrow-protected workflow.

Promo is a mobile-first influencer marketing platform built for the Indian market.
It connects brands (businesses of any size) with verified content creators (influencers) through a transparent, secure, end-to-end workflow — from campaign brief creation to content delivery and payment release.

## What Promo Is

Promo eliminates the inefficiencies of traditional influencer marketing by providing:
- A campaign card system where brands post structured briefs
- A verified creator discovery and application system
- Secure escrow-based payments that protect both brands and creators
- Digital agreement builder for legally-binding collaboration contracts
- Real-time chat, dispute resolution, and AI assistance
- Creator leaderboards and certification programs

## Who Uses Promo

**Brands**: D2C startups, established enterprises, and any business wanting to run influencer campaigns without agencies. Brands create campaign cards, review influencer applications, sign agreements, fund escrow, approve deliverables, and release payments.

**Creators / Influencers**: Content creators of all follower tiers (nano: 1K–10K, micro: 10K–100K, macro: 100K–1M, mega: 1M+). Creators discover campaigns, apply with their profile, sign agreements, produce content, submit deliverables, and receive guaranteed payments via escrow.

## Core Features

### For Brands
- **Campaign Card Builder**: Create structured campaign briefs with deliverable specs (Reels, Stories, YouTube Shorts, etc.), budget caps, application deadlines, and audience targeting criteria
- **Applicant Management**: Review influencer applications with full profile data, approve or reject, and shortlist candidates
- **Influencer Discovery**: Search and filter the verified creator pool by niche, location, follower tier, and engagement rate
- **Secure Escrow Payments**: Fund campaign budgets into platform-managed escrow; funds released only after deliverable approval
- **Agreement Builder**: Generate tamper-proof digital collaboration agreements; both parties countersign in-app
- **Brand Analytics**: Campaign ROI tracking, spend breakdown, influencer post performance metrics

### For Influencers / Creators
- **Campaign Discovery**: Browse a live feed of brand campaign cards; filter by niche, payout, and location
- **Geo-Discovery Map**: Find brands and campaigns near your city or region on a real-time interactive map
- **One-Tap Applications**: Apply with pre-filled profile data; add a personalised pitch note
- **Promo Page**: Public creator profile and media kit accessible at /@username — shareable as a bio link
- **Creator Leaderboard**: Public ranking by campaigns completed, earnings, engagement rate, and trust score
- **Creator Certifications**: Platform-issued badges for milestones (identity verified, top-rated, rising star, etc.)

### Shared Tools (for all users)
- Real-time end-to-end encrypted chat with image sharing
- Smart push and in-app notifications
- Built-in AI assistant for briefs, pitches, and recommendations
- Dispute resolution system (72-hour admin mediation, escrow frozen during disputes)
- Global search across campaigns, profiles, and messages
- Two-factor authentication (TOTP via Google Authenticator / Authy) — mandatory
- Offline mode with local caching
- Full account settings: security, privacy controls, 2FA, notification preferences

### Trust & Safety
- Identity verification for all users (government ID for creators, business credentials for brands)
- Granular privacy controls (public / brand-only / private profile visibility)
- Report and block system with 24-hour moderation response
- Fake follower detection and account suspension for metric misrepresentation

## How the Escrow Payment System Works

1. Both parties digitally sign a collaboration agreement in-app
2. Brand deposits the campaign budget into Promo's secure escrow wallet (card/net banking/UPI)
3. Funds are locked — inaccessible to both parties
4. Creator sees "Escrow Funded" status and begins content creation
5. Creator publishes content and submits live URL via milestone tracker
6. Promo auto-verifies the post is live and meets requirements
7. Brand reviews and approves the deliverable
8. Brand taps "Release Payment" → funds instantly credited to creator's Promo wallet
9. Creator withdraws to bank account (2–4 business days) or UPI

**Dispute process**: Either party can raise a formal dispute before payment release. Escrow is frozen. Admin team reviews evidence within 72 hours and makes a binding decision within 7 business days.

**Refund policy**: Full refund to brand if creator fails to deliver. Partial refund for milestone cancellations. No refund after brand approves and releases payment.

## Onboarding Flow

**Brand onboarding**:
1. Sign up → email verification → 2FA setup → business verification (GST/incorporation docs) → campaign card creation

**Creator onboarding**:
1. Sign up → set username and niche → set up Promo Page → link social accounts → identity verification → browse campaigns → apply

## Platform Technology

- Mobile app: Flutter (cross-platform iOS and Android)
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Realtime, Storage)
- Auth: Email/password + mandatory TOTP 2FA
- Payments: Escrow system via licensed payment processor
- Real-time features: Supabase Realtime subscriptions
- AI: Built-in AI assistant for both user types
- Analytics: Promo Page analytics, campaign performance tracking

## Pages on This Site

- / — Main landing page
- /features — Full feature breakdown for brands and influencers
- /how-it-works — Step-by-step platform walkthrough for brands and creators
- /escrow-guide — Deep dive into Promo's escrow payment system
- /faq — Comprehensive FAQ (60+ questions covering all topics)
- /brand-guide — Brand-specific onboarding and campaign guide
- /influencer-guide — Creator-specific onboarding and earning guide
- /leaderboard — Live public creator leaderboard
- /about — About the Promo team and mission
- /beta — Beta program (bug reports, idea submissions, internship applications)
- /research — Research center for academic and industry partnership
- /privacy-policy — Full privacy policy
- /terms — Terms of service
- /delete-account — Account deletion request process

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2026
- Headquarters: India
- Current market: India (INR payments)
- Minimum campaign value: ₹500
- Platform fee: Transparent percentage on completed campaigns (shown at payment step)
- App platforms: Android and iOS
- Verification time: Up to 24 hours for identity and business verification
- Dispute resolution: 72-hour initial response, 7-day resolution target
- Withdrawal processing: 2–4 business days to bank account

## Contact & Support

- Bug reports and feature ideas: promo.app/beta
- Research partnerships: promo.app/research
- Account deletion: promo.app/delete-account
- Support: Via in-app Support screen
